about.title: About
about.shortBio: Dietitian, Nutritionist, Functional Medicine and Anti Age specialist Dr. Leyla Zulfugarli — with 15 years of international experience, over 12,000 successful patient results, and her appearances and programs on Moscow TV, Show TV and other major TV channels, she is the country's primary expert in the field of healthy nutrition.
about.bio1: Dr. Leyla Zulfugarli — Dietitian, Nutritionist, Functional Medicine and Anti Age specialist. After completing her higher medical education in Baku in 2008, she underwent scientific-practical internship in leading clinics of Ukraine and Turkey (Istanbul Medipol University). She is the author of the first books in the field of dietetics in Azerbaijan.
about.bio2:
Academic Achievements and Experience:
• More than 15 years of clinical experience and over 12,000 individual patient successes.
• Scientific presentations and participation in international congresses in Prague (ECO), London (IFSO) and Tbilisi (EASD).
• Specialization in "Nutrition and Dietetics" and Bariatric Surgery dietetics at Istanbul Medipol University.
• Training of specialists under the official education system of the Ukrainian Dietitians Association.
• Continuous scientific reports at international scientific conferences and application of medical innovations in practice.
about.bio3:
Methodology and Media:
Dr. Leyla is the only representative in the country of the world-renowned healthy weight loss methodology without sports and hunger based on the principle "Our enemy is not fat, but sugar". Through her regular appearances on Moscow TV, Show TV, AzTV and other leading channels, she promotes a healthy lifestyle to the masses. Her approach is based on restoring the biochemical balance of the body.
about.bio4:
Authorship and Mission:
In 2015, she published the country's first diet book "Eat Healthy - Lose Weight" and in 2017 the book "The Secret of Obesity". Her main mission is not just weight loss, but increasing the quality of people's lives by renewing at the cellular level and restoring metabolic balance. She aims to instill in people that food is not a restriction, but a source of health and energy.
about.missionText1: Knowing that each person is different, preparing a unique nutrition plan for everyone. For a healthy life, food should be a pleasure, a lifestyle — not a restriction.
about.missionText2: My goal is to raise not only the weight of my patient, but also their health, energy level and quality of life.
about.servicesTitle: What do I do for my patients?
servicesList: Individual diet programs for weight loss and weight reduction (without sports)
Individual weight gain plans for those who want to gain weight
Healthy nutrition consultation and water intake plan
Prevention of aging — consultation in the field of nutrition
Detox program and body cleansing with detox tea
Seminars, events, media and TV appearances
certsList: IFSO (International Federation for the Surgery of Obesity) - London
EASD (European Assoc. for the Study of Diabetes) - Tbilisi

items.name: Ms. Narmina
items.text: I had been suffering from obesity for 9-10 years. I could no longer walk and was having great difficulty. Although I applied to many places, I couldn't get results. Thanks to Ms. Leyla's personalized program, I lost exactly 30 kg in 4 months! Now I feel very healthy.

items.name: Murad Arif (Composer, Producer)
items.text: Thanks to Leyla's personalized program, I lost exactly 30 kg in just 3 months! Most importantly, I achieved this result healthily without any surgery and I'm maintaining my weight.

items.name: Gunay
items.text: I am so happy because this was my first diet and I lost 7 kilos in 1 month. Since I have Hashimoto's disease, I could only lose 1-2 kilos at most before. But thanks to Leyla's special approach, I achieved this success!

items.name: Revanə khanim (54 years old)
items.text: I came to Dr. Leyla with high sugar and overweight. In a short time, my sugar normalized and I started losing weight. It was like a miracle!
